headline: Netflix May Be Cheap Enough to Tempt Buyers After Earnings Drop

headline: Why fuboTV (FUBO) Shares Are Sliding Today
summary: Shares of live sports and TV streaming service fuboTV (NYSE:FUBO) fell 4.9% in the afternoon session after news of a $15 per month price increase for its service was coupled with a broad sell-off in streaming stocks as industry leader Netflix reported a weak outlook. The negative sentiment for the sector was largely driven by Netflix, whose shares sank more than 10% after it forecast slowing revenue gains. This fueled fears that the streaming industry's growth may have peaked. For Fubo, customer
